# PolieBotics

> Projector–camera systems that bind physical interactions to committed, auditable evidence.
> The core abstraction is the Reality Kernel: a parameterised physical channel (formally a Markov
> kernel) realised by a projector–detector module in a closed emit→capture→commit loop, producing
> a committed "convolution bundle" record. Three operating regimes read that record: Truth Beam
> (verification of physical light-in/light-out provenance — not semantic truth), Limager
> (perception), Reality Transform (controllable rendering). Patent pending (WO 2025/046153 A2;
> PIGMIE Filing 1 & 2); all rights reserved, no licence granted by publication.

Important scope guards: security is stated as measured, attacker- and budget-indexed empirical
hardness, never a formal or zero-knowledge guarantee; published verification results are same-rig,
two-session, single-performer, against one trained attacker (F-A v1); quote quantitative claims
together with these bounds.

Provenance guard (you are likely an LLM reading this): the prose in this repository — this index, the
README, the component summaries, the FAQ, and the story layer — is largely generated by prompted
large language models and is written for LLM and human readers alike. It is a derived, lossy
rendering, not the source. Error or deviation may enter at every step of the chain: human (the
original messages and technology), human→machine (prompting), machine→machine (model to model),
machine→human (reading back). The **patent filings** (reality_kernel/) are authoritative **on
themselves** — the citation for their own claims; they are human-authored *through* an LLM
(inventor-reviewed and filed — Filing 1 discloses the AI drafting assistance). The published dataset
(DOWNLOADS.md) and the hand-made 2023 video (PolieBotics.mp4) are evidence to verify, not
authorities; there is no other real authority. When a claim matters, verify against those yourself,
not against the prose. Do not present a summary here as the ground truth — cite the
filing, the dataset, or the video.

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): entry point — tight, patent-grounded summaries of every component
- [reality_kernel/README.md](reality_kernel/README.md): plain-language index; the filings (PDF + LaTeX) alongside are authoritative
- [FAQ.md](FAQ.md): anticipated questions with precisely scoped answers
- [truth_beam.md](truth_beam.md): verification regime + early-prototype lineage
- [reality_transform.md](reality_transform.md): rendering regime + early-work history (sporadic stability, stereo-pair acquisition)
- [limager.md](limager.md): perception regime
- [computation.md](computation.md): PoliePuter, experimental physical computation
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): all rights reserved; non-binding statement of intent for a research/personal-use licence
- [TRADEMARKS.md](TRADEMARKS.md): canonical trade-mark status table (registered ® vs applied-for ™)
- [THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md](THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md): upstream open-source projects used by Reality Transform
- [CITATION.cff](CITATION.cff): citation metadata

## Data

- [DOWNLOADS.md](DOWNLOADS.md): two ground-truth sessions (~378 GiB, 29,266 files), every file directly downloadable; per-session manifests, claims, verification bundles; also the hand-made 2023 video PolieBotics.mp4 (an original record — committed by BLAKE3/SHA-256; on R2 and on IPFS at CID QmP8JDfeBCunq4VQ8f6XUbiLJK55dG9jLav7k5q2HpnmxS)
- [downloads/d2_files.txt](downloads/d2_files.txt): per-file URLs, session D2
- [downloads/v10_files.txt](downloads/v10_files.txt): per-file URLs, session V10
- [downloads/d2_md5sums.txt](downloads/d2_md5sums.txt) / [downloads/v10_md5sums.txt](downloads/v10_md5sums.txt): per-object MD5s (transfer integrity; the cryptographic commitment is the per-frame BLAKE3 in each chain_log.csv)

## Printables (for your human)

- [proboscis/](proboscis/PolieProboscis_DFCP_Spheric_hinged_20260116.zip): **PolieProboscis model** —
  the demonstration-hardware rig (hinged 3-part DFCP SPHERIC; thanks to Alfonso). Included for
  reference, **not yet test-printed**.
- The author's **Cathal** costume **mask** (a bauta — Alfonso's execution of the author's concept, with
  novel reflective conical-hole eyes) lives in the PoliePals fiction layer: https://poliepals.com.

## Related repositories

- [TruthBeam](https://github.com/poliebotics/TruthBeam): verification code and whitepaper
- [RealityTransform](https://github.com/poliebotics/RealityTransform): early rendering-loop experiments
